channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
item.description: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be comprised of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.

item.title: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won’t ship until 2027
item.description: Valve has some good news and bad news about Steam Controllers. The good news: if you make a reservation for a Steam Controller, the company will now show you one of three estimates of when you'll be able to actually order your gamepad: by September 2026, by December 2026, or sometime in 2027. The bad […]

item.title: You can now use the Game Boy Camera with your phone
item.description: The $50 GB Operator is an accessory that lets you connect, play, and authenticate Game Boy, Game Boy Color, and Game Boy Advance cartridges on PCs and other devices. Now it's getting some new functionality for the Game Boy Camera. After turning the Game Boy Camera into a charmingly awful desktop webcam two years ago, […]

item.title: 'Better tighten your World Cup security' — Iran-linked hackers claim massive FBI drone breach, threaten FPV attacks
item.description: Iran-linked hackers claimed access to FBI drone surveillance systems and warned about World Cup security, though evidence remains disputed.

item.title: Illinois smart glasses driving ban continues ongoing efforts to restrict the tech’s usage — but I kinda agree with this one
item.description: Illinois smart glasses driving ban ‘gives cops license to pull over anyone’ fear some.

item.title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
item.description: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

item.title: The 11 standout startups from YC’s Demo Day, according to VCs
item.description: TechCrunch spoke to investors to find the hottest startups in the Spring 2026 YC batch. Some of them commanded valuations of over $175 million, VCs said.

item.title: 44 Best Father’s Day Gifts for Dads (2026)
item.description: Dads are traditionally tough to shop for—let me help with these handpicked gift ideas for fathers with great taste.

item.title: Rivian faces a class action lawsuit over self-driving in its early vehicles
item.description: Rivian is being sued over the self-driving capabilities of its early vehicles, or lack thereof.

item.title: Rivian owners file lawsuit alleging false promises on self-driving features
item.description: Plaintiffs in the class action complaint allege Rivian falsely promised for years it would bring hands-free driving to its first-generation R1 vehicles.

item.title: Meta’s AI Workers Are Revolting, Peter Thiel’s Secret Society, and SBF’s Plea to Trump
item.description: On today’s Uncanny Valley, we dive into the dysfunction in Meta’s newly formed AI unit and why it’s been driving already-low employee morale even further into the ground.

item.title: Les États-Unis refusent aux pays du G7 l’accès aux IA d’Anthropic, coupées dans le monde entier
item.description: Washington refuse de lever son interdiction d'export sur les IA les plus puissantes d'Anthropic, même pour ses alliés du G7. Résultat : Fable 5 et Mythos 5 restent coupés pour tout le monde, partout.

item.title: HBO Max’s annual plans are 28 percent off right now
item.description: The easiest way to save on a streaming service is often to pay for a year upfront, which HBO Max is currently making a lot cheaper. Through July 15, 2026, new and returning subscribers can get 28 percent off any of HBO Max’s yearly plans, bringing the ad-supported tier down to $78.99 ($31 off) per […]

item.title: Xbox studio apocalypse: Every studio closure rumored and confirmed
item.description: Xbox is said to be negotiating with several studios for possible closures or spin-offs.

item.title: Snap’s Specs look good on nobody
item.description: Snap's new smart glasses are probably the most impressive bit of face-computer technology we've seen. They're not VR-headset huge; they don't have a big charging puck; thanks to Snap's many years of AR lens development, they're likely to have a lot of features right out of the box. (Yes, they're $2,195, but that may just […]

item.title: TF1 arrive sur Netflix le 19 juin : même en payant l’offre sans pub, vous en aurez quand même
item.description: Dès le 19 juin, Netflix héberge les cinq chaînes en direct de TF1 et tout le catalogue de TF1+. Avec un détail qui pique : même en payant l'offre Premium, vous aurez de la pub.

item.title: How to watch Canada vs Qatar: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts seek first win
item.description: Here's how to watch Canada vs Qatar for free online and from anywhere in Group B of the FIFA World Cup 2026 as the co-hosts seek a first tournament win.

item.title: Valve releases SteamOS 3.8 — and it comes with the biggest hint yet that the Steam Machine is about to arrive
item.description: The evidence that the Steam Machine is imminent is piling up, as a new version of SteamOS officially prepares the ground for Valve's gaming PC.

item.title: House of the Dragon: Everything you need to know in 2 minutes
item.description: Everything you need to know heading into "House of the Dragon" Season 3 in this dense recap.

item.title: How to watch Canada vs. Qatar online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Canada vs. Qatar in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Coupe du monde 2026 : pourquoi beIN Sports ne diffuse pas en 4K en France
item.description: beIN Sports diffuse les matchs de la Coupe du monde 2026, mais pas en 4K en France. Et la chaîne assume, avec une explication qui ne va pas plaire à tout le monde, surtout si vous avez un grand téléviseur.

item.title: The best early Amazon Prime Day deals so far
item.description: Amazon’s earlier-than-usual Prime Day doesn’t begin until June 23rd, but there are several even earlier deals on must-have products that you can check out right now. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price at Amazon and Walmart (though, the sale keeps playing peek-a-boo). Also, you can grab Ring’s […]

item.title: Almost half of U.S. singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
item.description: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but, many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.

item.title: Instagram now lets you add a unique caption to each carousel slide
item.description: Instagram carousels can now be up to 20 slides with 20 unique captions.

item.title: 'This marks a sophisticated evolution': Experts warn Claude feature hijacked by hackers to launch major malware campaign
item.description: Shared Chats is being abused to lend legitimacy to ClickFix campaigns targeting software developers.

item.title: Walmart's unbelievable 50% discount on its Plus membership is back for a limited time — take advantage of this incredible deal while you can
item.description: I can't recommend this deal enough – Walmart is offering an incredible 50% discount on its Plus membership, bringing the price down to just $49 a year.
